sections.paragraph:
fut. apoc. יִחַדְּ to be glad. (Syriac ܚܕܐܳ, חֲדָא id. In the western languages there accord with this, γηθέω, γαθέω, to rejoice.) Exo 18:9. Job 3:6, אַל יִחַדְּ בִּימֵי שָׁנָה “let it not rejoice amongst the days of the year.”

Piel, to make glad, Psa 21:7.

Derivatives, חֶדְוָה [pr.n. יַחְדִּיאֵל, יִּחְדִּיָחוּ].
